title: Command Cockpit Signal Rails
summary: Compressed the mounted-stage Objective and Bot Party docks into slim signal rails inside the Command Cockpit so status and operator presence stay visible without crowding the playable lane stage.
proof: Scoped rail compression to the Command Cockpit so the fuller Objective and Bot Party docks remain available in other deck modes.
Reduced objective beacon height, padding, and sticky offset while hiding long helper copy only in the Cockpit.
Reduced bot dock height, card padding, and avatar size while preserving bot callsign and status as compact presence pips.
Updated README, index marker, snapshot generation, regression floors, and trace metadata so the standalone atlas records the Signal Rails unlock.
